defs.eff6: Kaufman efficiency |o[i]-o[i-6]| / sum_{j=i-6}^{i-1}|o[j+1]-o[j]| on 5m open-to-open, 30-min window, known at decision time
defs.cnt12: count of |open-to-open move| >= 12bps among the 12 moves in the hour BEFORE the trigger move (trigger excluded)

recalibration.objective: total net pnl of gated trades at p=0.51 exact fee, constraint gated_n >= max(20, 25% of window trades)
recalibration.evidence: common-span OOS (last 20d): W10/R10 +5.15c, W20/R10 +4.56c, W30-40/R10 +4.02c (=static); R5 variants worse (W20/R5 +3.15c, W10/R5 +4.00c) -> refit thrash; sensitivity surface is a plateau so capped steps lose little

fill_assumption: p=0.51 = pm_prices_sample p20 median 0.495 + 1c slip; fee 0.07*p*(1-p)=0.017493/share; breakeven wr 0.527493
